caption:
You won’t love this all of the time, stop thinking you should be 😂

There’s a big difference between fun, enjoyment, and passion 

If you’re passionate about something then you can push through the pain that it puts on you 

If you think that this is going to be fun and enjoyable every single day, you’re in for a reality check 

There are extensive, long periods of time where you will go through nothing other than self-doubt 

You will fear the repercussions of things that potentially might not work 

You will go through an identity crisis the higher that you go through these levels 

Which is why I’ll come back to the point at the start around passion 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy your offers 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy your niche 

A lot of you don’t even enjoy creating content 

A lot of you don’t even know why you are even doing this 

No wonder you’re fucking burnt out, falling out with it and constantly hot and cold 

Don’t get lost with all this high-tech AI stuff and nail the basics of what you need to scale a business 

FYI we can’t help you with both above

Is this my life now?

Start up business owners - it will be awful for you but it doesn’t last forever when you start building a team.

Scaling business owners - you can design your own life, do you actually see that? Fuck the money (and you will earn more when you have space to innovate) 

Normal 9-5 jobs - you might need to answer this question sooner to see what else it is from your life you want and need.

Mums - you are the elite beyond elite, but it doesn’t last forever and speak to who you need to speak to in order to make things better 

Dads - what’s that dream you once had? Why did you give up on it - your wife and kids need a man filled with passion, not regret.

Least favourite parent - fuck knows on this one but I’m sure you can give me some good advice 😂

caption:
I don’t really have the words for a video for this…

All I can say is that finishing this book and experiencing Chapter 10 - Finding Peace & Purpose and feeling the best fatherhood has to give… lit a fire of hunger, resilience and relentlessness that I don’t think I’ve experienced since the starting point of these chapters… 15 years ago.

Orders available with the link in my bio 📚

Here’s a taste of the book…

“As I’m writing this, I’m a multi-7 figure business owner, husband, father, team leader. I am happy, I have freedom and purpose, and that hasn’t been an easy road. So despite how open I am about my previous struggles throughout the book, I want you to know that the journey I’m about to take you on—through both the crushing lows and exhilarating highs, has led me to a place where life finally makes sense. Where the chaos has order. Where the daily battles have purpose. Where I am winning, when for a very long time, I didn’t know how long I’d be able to maintain participation.

This isn’t just another business book (even though there are 154 key actionable’s).

This isn’t just another self-help manifesto (despite there being 96 life lesson’s).

This is the raw, unfiltered story of how I discovered what I call “The 50/50 Rule”, the fundamental truth that success, fulfilment, and genuine impact come from mastering two distinct but equally crucial domains: your inner world and your outer systems.

50% human. 50% machine.

Chat

Code

Maximise one, sign up to the pro plan and absolutely rinse it
